body:
## Summary
- mark `^http://iroirosokuhou\.com/archives/\d+\.html$` as ignored in `.github/port.md`
- remove the stale `色々まとめ速報` rule from `resources/fullfeed/items_all.json`
- update cache memory progress for the processed rule

## Why
The first eligible `items_all.json` candidate resolved to `https://iroirosokuhou.com/` but returned a Cloudflare 403 page, so the site is not currently usable for rule migration.

## Notes
- `plus.json` was unchanged because the site could not be migrated
- validated JSON syntax for `items_all.json` and `plus.json`
- ran `composer run lint`
- ran `composer run test`
title: chore: ignore iroirosokuhou rule
